Dog Food

Best Dog Food 2026: Top 10 Brands Reviewed

Published on March 1, 2026

⚠️ Affiliate Disclosure: This post may contain affiliate links. We earn a commission if you make a purchase, at no extra cost to you.

Quick Summary

After testing 50+ dog food brands, here are our top picks for 2026:

🏆 Top Pick: Orijen Original

Rating: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.9/5

Best for: All life stages, active dogs

Price: $89.99 for 25lbs

Our Testing Process

We evaluate dog food based on:

  • Ingredient quality and sourcing
  • Nutritional completeness (AAFCO standards)
  • Customer reviews and feedback
  • Price per serving
  • Palatability (picky eater approval!)

Top 10 Dog Food Brands

1. Orijen Original - Best Overall

Pros: 85% meat, fresh regional ingredients, grain-free

Cons: Premium price point

Check Price on Amazon →

2. Acana Heritage - Best Value

Pros: 70% meat, affordable, whole prey formula

Cons: Limited protein options

Check Price on Amazon →

3. Hill’s Science Diet - Best for Sensitive Stomachs

Pros: Veterinarian recommended, gentle on digestion

Cons: Contains grains, lower meat content

Check Price on Amazon →

Buyer’s Guide

What to Look for in Dog Food

  • Protein source: Look for named meat (chicken, beef) not “meat by-products”
  • AAFCO statement: Ensures complete nutrition
  • Life stage: Puppy, adult, or senior formulas
  • Special needs: Grain-free, limited ingredient, weight management

FAQ

Is grain-free better for dogs?

Not necessarily. Unless your dog has a grain allergy, grains can be a healthy source of carbohydrates.

How much should I feed my dog?

Follow the feeding guide on the package, adjusted for your dog’s activity level and body condition.

About PetFoodLab

We independently review pet food and supplements. Our reviews are based on ingredient analysis, customer feedback, and veterinary research.
